Unfortunately, there is no information on Lorentea saturejoides. However, I found information on Lomatium saturejoides, also known as Lorentea saturejoides synonym. 

Here's a paragraph about Lomatium saturejoides:

Lomatium saturejoides, also known as Lorentea saturejoides, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Lomatium saturejoides include sesquiterpenes, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, such as tinctures, teas, and salves, to treat various health conditions.
